rows.timestamp_evidence_note: Downloaded Treasury HTML includes field-news-publication-date datetime=2022-05-02T19:00:00Z; manual release timestamp uses the reviewed ET release stamp 2022-05-02T15:00:00-04:00.
rows.bundle_decomposition_evidence: Component has its own Treasury financing-estimates release URL and reviewed publication timestamp; same-event policy statement is tracked as a separate Treasury release component.
rows.review_notes: Reviewed easing quarter from official schedule change.
rows.expectation_notes: Reviewed component surprise proxy. Treasury archive lists the April 2022 primary dealer auction-size survey, but the PDF metadata shows CreationDate 2022-05-03 15:03:39 ET, after the 2022-05-02 15:00 ET financing release timestamp. The nearest quarter-specific TBAC recommended financing table archived by Treasury is dated 2022-05-04 for 2022Q3, which is also post-release invalid for causal surprise use.
rows.benchmark_search_note: Reviewed Treasury-hosted primary dealer auction survey and Treasury/TBAC financing-table families. The archived April 2022 survey is not admissible because its PDF CreationDate is after the financing release timestamp, and the quarter-specific TBAC table is dated 2022-05-04.
rows.decision_rule: Reviewed exact-time Treasury financing release against local overlap annotations; no separate same-window external macro release is documented for this component.
rows.contamination_notes: Reviewed clean; no separate external macro overlap recorded in local materials.
rows.macro_crosswalk_note: Explicit same-day FOMC overlap is already cross-walked in local audit materials.
